contentBlocks.original:
कल्याणाद्भुतगात्राय कामितार्थ प्रदायिने ।
श्रीवेंकटनिवासाय श्रीनिवासाय मंगलम् ।।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
kalyāṇādbhutagātrāya kāmitārtha pradāyine .
śrīveṃkaṭanivāsāya śrīnivāsāya maṃgalam ..
contentBlocks.translation: O auspicious Lord Srinivasa, the auspiciously-wonderful-bodied god, the bestower of all desired wishes, the consort of Sri (Lakshmi), the depository of the treasure of auspiciousness, the wealthy treasure of beseechers, resident of Venkatagiri, salutations to that Lord Srinivasa.
contentBlocks.meanings: कल्याण (kalyāṇa) – auspicious; अद्भुत (adbhuta) – wonderful; गात्राय (gātrāya) – to the bodied; कामितार्थ (kāmitārtha) – desired wishes (kāmita:desired | artha:wishes); प्रदायिने (pradāyine) – bestower; श्री (śrī) – Sri (Lakshmi); वेंकट (veṃkaṭa) – Venkatagiri; निवासाय (nivāsāya) – resident; श्रीनिवासाय (śrīnivāsāya) – to Lord Srinivasa (śrī:Sri (Lakshmi) | nivāsa:residence); मंगलम् (maṃgalam) – salutations;
